title: Wolf Song
writer: Harvey Fergusson, John Farrow, Keene Thompson
actors: Gary Cooper, Lupe Velez, Louis Wolheim
plot: In 1840, Sam Lash heads west for adventure. He meets up with some Mountain Men, and they head for the Rockies to trap beavers and cats. In Taos he meets Lola, a beautiful Mexican girl from a proud and rich family. They fall in lov...
